rulings.Case Title: 524 HOWARD LLC VS. REDWOOD MORTGAGE INVESTORS VIII, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 23, 2012, line 1 - DEFENDANT REDWOOD MORTGAGE INVESTORS VIII,, REDWOOD MORTGAGE CORP., MICHAEL BURWELL, LOREEN RANDICH Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens. Grant plaintiff failed to sustain burden that they can prevail on merits of their real estate claims. prevailing party prepare order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MELINDA B. CORTEZ et al VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 23, 2012, line 2 - DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW, RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend as to first cause of action, sustain with leave to amend as to second,third,fourth and fifth causes of action =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MELINDA B. CORTEZ et al VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 23, 2012, line 2 - DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW, RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Off calendar moot.

rulings.Case Title: ANDY YU VS. JULIA FAJARDO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 23, 2012, line 4 -DEFENDANT JULIA FAJARDO, JOSUE ESTRELLA, YESENIA SOSA, ANGEL CETINA, HILDA TEJERO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. rulings.Case Title: MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, A CALIFORNIA VS. ALI ARDO ALGHAITHY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 23, 2012, line 5 -DEFENDANT ALI ALGHAITHY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, 5 days to answer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MC CANCE VS. MEGAN KORMI AKA NAGIN KORMI et al
